import React, { useCallback } from 'react'; import { useDropzone } from 'react-dropzone'; import './FileUpload.css'; function FileUpload({ onFileUpload, onConnectUPI, error }) { const onDrop = useCallback((acceptedFiles) => { if (acceptedFiles.length > 0) { onFileUpload(acceptedFiles[0]); } }, [onFileUpload]); const { getRootProps, getInputProps, isDragActive } = useDropzone({ onDrop, accept: { 'text/csv': ['.csv'], 'application/vnd.ms-excel': ['.xls'], 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet': ['.xlsx'], 'application/pdf': ['.pdf'] }, multiple: false, maxSize: 10485760 // 10MB }); return (

📄

Manual

Upload your bank statement file for one-time analysis

Drop your file here...

) : ( <>

Drag & drop your file here

or click to browse

)}
✅ CSV, Excel, PDF supported
✅ Instant analysis
✅ No account needed

OR
{/* Option 2: Connect UPI */}
🔗

Connect UPI App

Automatic

Connect your UPI app once and get automatic monthly analysis

⚡
No Manual Uploads

Connect once, forget forever

🔄
Auto-Sync

Real-time transaction updates

📊
Continuous Analysis

Monthly reports generated automatically

Supported Apps:

💳 📱 💰 🛒 +4 more
✅ Bank-level security
✅ Read-only access
✅ Revoke anytime
{error && (
{error}
)}
🔒
Your Data is Secure

Bank-level encryption • RBI compliant • Privacy protected

); } export default FileUpload;
